notes: Specs confirmed from multiple secondary sources (knitec.com specs page, avlgear.com, conferenceroomav.com, Barco spare parts page confirming 12VDC 2A power adapter, ManualsLib CX-20 installation manual confirming barrel connector power type for CX-series). Barco's own product page (barco.com) returned HTTP 403, preventing direct verification. The CX-30 is a wireless presentation/conferencing system — it has no SDI, XLR, or analog audio ports. Audio is routed via HDMI or USB peripherals only. Gen1 has USB 2.0 ports; Gen2 (model C3010S / R9861613USB2) upgrades to USB 3.0 and adds DP 1.2 + PD over USB-C. HDMI grade hdmi-1.4 confirmed (HDMI 1.4b spec stated in multiple sources).

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: HDMI 1.4b; outputs up to 4K UHD (3840×2160) @ 30Hz. Gen2 also supports DisplayPort 1.2 via USB-C.

ports.name: USB-C
ports.note: Front panel; USB 2.0 on Gen1. Gen2 upgrades to USB 3.0 with DisplayPort 1.2 and Power Delivery support. Used for Button pairing and USB peripherals.

ports.name: USB-A
ports.note: Front panel; USB 2.0 on Gen1. Gen2 upgrades to USB 3.0. Used for USB peripherals (camera, mic, speakerphone).

ports.name: Power
ports.note: 12 VDC 2A via external power adapter with interchangeable regional AC plugs. Gen2 can also be powered via USB-C (Power Delivery).
